title: Drip vs Mailgun (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Drip vs Mailgun: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Drip and Mailgun comes down to your specific use case. Drip is built for e-commerce businesses wanting deep store integration, while Mailgun targets developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

comparison_table.tool_a: E-Commerce Businesses Wanting Deep Store Integration
comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Sending Transactional And Bulk Email Via Api

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on e-commerce businesses wanting deep store integration
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers sending transactional and bulk email via API

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Drip wins for e-commerce businesses wanting deep store integration, while Mailgun is stronger for developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Drip or Mailgun?
faq.a: Mailgun starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Mailgun to Drip?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
